name: 磁生电（电磁感应）
subject: physics
author: weponusa
description: 通过法拉第电磁感应实验揭示磁生电的原理，理解感应电流产生的两个条件（闭合回路+磁通量变化），掌握楞次定律判断感应电流方向（增反减同）。
description_en: Discover Faraday's electromagnetic induction, understand the two conditions for induced current, and master Lenz's law for determining current direction.
